name: lazytax
description: Evidence-first verification for synthetic Indian tax returns, powered by deterministic local tools.

interface.shortDescription: Verify an Indian tax return with source-linked evidence.
interface.longDescription: LazyTax turns Codex into an evidence-first tax verification workspace for a narrowly supported synthetic Indian taxpayer profile. It reconciles source records, delegates every numeric result to deterministic local tools, records confirmations, and generates a Tax Proof Pack without filing anything.
defaultPrompt: Verify these synthetic tax documents and show every discrepancy.
Compare both tax regimes and cite the evidence for every number.
Generate a Tax Proof Pack after I approve all resolutions.
